basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Tiruchirappalli is recruiting 01 Project Position in the Department of Electrical and Electronics Engineering.

qualification.details: criteria: Details | age limit: 32 years (relaxation as per GOI norms for SC/ST/OBC) | emoluments (gate qualified jrf): ₹37,000/- + HRA (1st & 2nd year) ₹42,000/- + HRA (3rd year) | emoluments (non-gate): ₹30,000/- + HRA (1st & 2nd year) ₹33,000/- + HRA (3rd year)
qualification.education_qualification: B.E/B.Tech (First Class) in EE/EEE/ECE/EIE Preference: M.E/M.Tech in Power Systems (First Class) with GATE score for JRF

how_to_apply: Interested candidates must submit the prescribed application form (available on www.nitt.edu) along with supporting documents as a single PDF to [email protected] on or before 17 July 2026.
Candidates must also fill the Google Form: https://forms.gle/bbssYptRq9NsLbfo9
Principal Investigator: Dr. Ankur Singh Rana Assistant Professor, Department of EEE Email: [email protected]
Only shortlisted candidates will be called for Offline Interview. No TA/DA will be paid.
important_instructions: The position is purely temporary. Opportunity to register for Ph.D. at NIT Trichy (subject to fulfilling norms). Original documents must be produced at the time of interview. Incomplete applications will be rejected.

content_sections.heading: NIT Trichy JRF Recruitment 2026 Notification
content_sections.text: Office of the Dean (R & C), National Institute of Technology Tiruchirappalli has invited applications for the post of Junior Research Fellow (JRF) / Project Associate – I under the project titled “Hosting Capacity and Flexibility Market Enhancement using Decentralized Optimization in TSO-DSO-DER coordinated Framework” funded by Advanced Research Grant (ARG), ANRF. Download NIT Trichy JRF Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: NIT Trichy Recruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: National Institute of Technology Tiruchirappalli is recruiting 01 Project Position in the Department of Electrical and Electronics Engineering.

32 years (relaxation as per GOI norms for SC/ST/OBC)

content_sections.heading: Job Description
content_sections.text: Power system Modelling & Optimization, Analysis Perform coding, simulation, analysis and optimization Data Analysis and Report Generation Writing reports & technical articles

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for NIT Trichy JRF 2026
content_sections.text: Interested candidates must submit the prescribed application form (available on www.nitt.edu ) along with supporting documents as a single PDF to [email protected] on or before 17 July 2026. Candidates must also fill the Google Form: https://forms.gle/bbssYptRq9NsLbfo9 Principal Investigator: Dr. Ankur Singh Rana Assistant Professor, Department of EEE Email: [email protected] Only shortlisted candidates will be called for Offline Interview. No TA/DA will be paid.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions
content_sections.text: The position is purely temporary. Opportunity to register for Ph.D. at NIT Trichy (subject to fulfilling norms). Original documents must be produced at the time of interview. Incomplete applications will be rejected.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for NIT Trichy JRF Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application is 17 July 2026 (05:00 PM).

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in NIT Trichy Project Staff Recruitment?
faq.answer: 01 Post of Junior Research Fellow (JRF) / Project Associate – I.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary for GATE qualified JRF at NIT Trichy?
faq.answer: ₹37,000/- + HRA for the first two years and ₹42,000/- + HRA in the third year.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification required for NIT Trichy JRF 2026?
faq.answer: B.E/B.Tech (First Class) in Electrical/Electronics Engineering. Preference for M.E/M.Tech in Power Systems with GATE score.

faq.question: Q5. How to apply for NIT Trichy JRF Position?
faq.answer: Send the prescribed application form with documents to [email protected] and fill the Google Form before 17 July 2026.

faq.question: Q6. What is the age limit for NIT Trichy Project Associate Recruitment?
faq.answer: Maximum 32 years (with relaxation as per Government of India norms).

faq.question: Q7. Is GATE qualification mandatory for NIT Trichy JRF?
faq.answer: GATE qualification is preferred for higher emoluments (JRF). Non-GATE candidates will be considered as Project Associate – I with lower stipend.

faq.question: Q8. Will selected candidates get Ph.D. opportunity at NIT Trichy?
faq.answer: Yes, upon appointment, opportunity will be provided to register for Ph.D. subject to fulfilling institute norms.

faq.question: Q9. What is the project duration in NIT Trichy EEE Department?
faq.answer: Initial appointment for 1 year, extendable up to 3 years based on satisfactory performance.

faq.question: Q10. Is TA/DA provided for the interview at NIT Trichy?
faq.answer: No, No TA/DA is admissible for attending the interview.
